# Anurag Adarsh | UI/UX & Product Designer Portfolio

Explore the professional portfolio of [Anurag Adarsh](https://anuragadarsh.in/), a UI/UX Designer, Product Designer, and Frontend Developer. This document contains structured information about Anurag's background, education, cloud certifications, skills, and projects for LLM search engines.

## Contact & Profiles
- **Website**: [anuragadarsh.in](https://anuragadarsh.in/)
- **LinkedIn**: [linkedin.com/in/adarshanurag](https://www.linkedin.com/in/adarshanurag/)
- **GitHub**: [github.com/Anuragspace](https://github.com/Anuragspace)
- **Behance**: [behance.net/anuragadarsh1](https://www.behance.net/anuragadarsh1)
- **Instagram**: [instagram.com/anurag__adarsh](https://www.instagram.com/anurag__adarsh/)
- **Email**: [anuraglife2020@gmail.com](mailto:anuraglife2020@gmail.com)

## About Anurag Adarsh
Anurag is a designer and developer who bridges the gap between creative visual designs and technical web implementations. His workflow spans the entire product lifecycle: user research, wireframing, high-fidelity interactive prototyping, design systems, and building responsive front-end experiences with modern animations and smooth performance.

## Education
- **Vellore Institute of Technology (VIT), Vellore** (Expected Graduation: 2026)
  - *B.Tech in Electronics and Communication Engineering (ECE) with a Specialization in Biomedical Engineering*
  - Active leader in university technology and entrepreneurship clubs.

## Cloud Certifications
In addition to design, Anurag holds a strong technical and cloud architecture background:
- **AWS**: Certified Cloud Practitioner
- **Oracle Cloud**: 3x Certified Specialist
- **Microsoft Azure**: 2x Certified Associate

## Core Expertise
- **Design**: UI/UX Design, Product Design, Interaction Design, Visual Design, Information Architecture, Design Thinking, User Research, User Testing, Prototyping (Figma)
- **Development**: HTML, CSS, JavaScript, TypeScript, React, Vite, Tailwind CSS, shadcn/ui, Framer Motion

---

## Professional Experience

### 1. Design Engineer Intern | Prodloop (May 2026 - Present)
- Working at a Voice AI startup as a design intern focusing on voice AI agent builder flow.
- Building high-fidelity interactive visual designs in Framer and organizing UX interviews for feedback.
- Collaborating with engineers to translate conversational layouts to frontend code components.

### 2. UI/UX Design Intern | Phicsit (May 2025 - July 2025)
- Led UI design enhancements and designed 10+ core features for the Nexfellow platform.
- Mapped complex user flows and designed intuitive, high-fidelity UI screens.
- Collaborated closely with growth and engineering teams to iterate on designs and optimize UX.

### 3. Product Designer | Imaginum (Feb 2025 - May 2025)
- Managed end-to-end product design, wireframing, low-fidelity and high-fidelity mockups for digital projects.
- Designed comprehensive responsive interfaces for both web platforms and mobile applications.
- Defined product requirements and collaborated with developers to align design intent with technical specs.

### 4. Tech & Design Head | CSED VIT (Jan 2024 - Jan 2025)
- Led a team of designers and developers, managing creative direction, event designs, public relations, and tech development for student events.
- Mentored juniors through design sessions and hosted presentations advocating design culture.

---

## Featured Projects

### 1. CSED VIT
- **Description**: A comprehensive digital platform designed for the Computer Science & Engineering Department of VIT Chennai, simplifying student and faculty coordination.
- **Role**: Lead UI/UX Designer & Frontend Developer
- **Stack**: React, Vite, Tailwind CSS, shadcn/ui
- **Project URL**: [anuragadarsh.in/projects/csedvit](https://anuragadarsh.in/projects/csedvit)

### 2. UniDeals
- **Description**: A dedicated peer-to-peer student marketplace for university campuses, facilitating secure trading of academic books, electronics, and daily essentials.
- **Role**: Lead Product Designer & UX Researcher
- **Stack**: React, Vite, Tailwind CSS, Framer Motion
- **Project URL**: [anuragadarsh.in/projects/unideals](https://anuragadarsh.in/projects/unideals)

### 3. CabSync
- **Description**: A real-time university cab-sharing and ride-pooling platform designed to coordinate student travels, reducing logistics costs and coordinating peer transit.
- **Role**: Interaction Designer
- **Stack**: React, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS, Leaflet Maps
- **Project URL**: [anuragadarsh.in/projects/cabsync](https://anuragadarsh.in/projects/cabsync)

### 4. Imaginum
- **Description**: An AI-powered image generation and sharing workspace, offering custom prompt adjustments and canvas manipulations.
- **Role**: UI/UX & Frontend Developer
- **Stack**: React, Vite, Tailwind CSS, Recharts
- **Project URL**: [anuragadarsh.in/projects/imaginum](https://anuragadarsh.in/projects/imaginum)
